title: Prospective Q2.6 seeds 1 and 3 family replication
body: Register seeds 1 and 3 as separate experiments against merged source commit 3ee802c29ddf47982477a6b6dd635eaedede7bb7. Preserve Q2.6 initialization, corpora, teachers, optimizer, tangent projection, geometric scales, quantity gates, 1.5% commit authority, 2% public ceiling, checkpoint cadence, attempt budgets, stop rules, and exactly-once promotion policy. Close two independent forecasts and 300 credits per seed before either execution. Execute both even if the first is no-go. Aggregate only after both valid results exist.
claims: Neither seed-1 nor seed-3 Q2.6-R outcome was observed before source, experiment, forecast, and funding contracts merged.
A seed-level go requires both public feasibility and promotion pass; a valid completed non-pass resolves no_go.
Family promotion requires all three declared seeds to resolve go and otherwise leaves ZERO.3 current.
